feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ADT Data Preview pobug when selecting columns
entry.content:
Hi community,

Does anyone know workaround for this bug when I Deselect all and then select the fields in Data Preview and OK button is still disabled?

Regards,
Nemanja

entry.title: Unable to print a billing document (AdobeForms) in VF02
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I  recently updated old smartforms for invoices and created new forms in ADOBEFORMS to comply with SAFT forms in Angola. However, in SAP transaction VF02, when trying to print a billing document with a downpayment equal to the due payment, an error message appears: 'Cannot print billing document 2023xxxxxxx; data for customer 26xxx is unreadable.' Despite the absence of relevant notes, how can this issue be resolved to successfully print the billing document

Please I need your help.

entry.title: FB60 does not post. No error message is displayed.
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I try to post in FB60 but nothing happens (No error message is displayed nor a successful message)

I record FB60 and create a batch session via SHDB tc.

When processing the batch session via SM35 I receive an error message:

 

No batch input data for screen SAPMF05A 1100

Message no. 00344

 

I expected to receive the name of the problematic field, which causes the error, but I did not.

 

How can I know what is the problem.

Thankyou in advance

Hagit Samet

entry.title: Change header field of purchase order on save
entry.content:
Hi all,

my requirement is to set PO header field UNSEZ to a specific value when PO is saved.
Sounds easy but even after trying several suggestions from different posts I have no working solution.

I tried BAdI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST, but Methods PROCESS_HEADER and PROCESS_ITEM are only triggered when a header or item field is manually changed, and that is not always the case in my scenario.

I also tried Methods POST and CHECK, but I am not able to get changes saved on the database.
From different posts I use following code:

data: lr_po_handle type ref to cl_po_header_handle_mm.
data: ls_header type mepoheader.

* Disable firwall
lr_po_handle ?= im_header.
lr_po_handle->my_cust_firewall_on = mmpur_yes.

* Get header data
ls_header = im_header->get_data( ).

* Set value
ls_header-unsez = text-100.

* Set header data
im_header->set_data( ls_header ).
im_header->set_changed( ).

* Enable firewall
lr_po_handle->my_cust_firewall_on = mmpur_no.

This code will change the field UNSEZ on Dynpro, but will not persist change on database.

Are there any solution to this issue. 

Thanks E. Hasse

entry.title: ABAP2XLSX in an old Abap version
entry.content:
Hello there.

I want to use ABAP2XLSX but my system have an old version of ABAP: 701.

I cannot activate the report ZABAPGIT_STANDALONE, it's using new syntax...

Any tip how to install ABAP2XLSX without ZABAPGIT ?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Trigger Basic Idoc from scratch
entry.content:
I have a requirement to create an Idoc from scratch without using any standard things. Let's say I have a custom table named EmpTable in my sender system. I want to transfer the table(just the fields or with the table entries also). So how do I achieve this?

I can create the segments, idoc type, message type and also the process code and function module to write my custom code. But my question is that how do I trigger my idoc. How do I send the Idoc from my sender system to the receiver system. Let's assume that the logical system is also created.

Is there any tcode to execute the idoc or do we have to create it using MPP?

entry.title: Purchase Requisition(ME51N) Screen Enhancement
entry.content:
Hi, experts

I'm a new abap developer, I'm having some difficulties.

I need to add a new self-created field in the system t-code ME51N, which is at 'Display Purchase Request Page' -->  'Subject Assignment' (screenshot 1), I checked out the layout in Screen-Painter of this subscreen and found that it is not the same as the foreground page (screenshot 2 3), I drew the self-created field and activated it in Screen-Painter, but the foreground page didn't display it either (screenshot 4); btw I need to read the value of the order field in screenshot 1, I tried to read it with field-symbols, assigned to this screen field, but it cannot work.  How can I make the self-created field display and get the value of the order field?

Thx and best regards!

entry.title: Error by Logon to the SAP Cloud System
entry.content:
Hello SAP Comunity, 

I have a free Trail account . I am currently facing a problem while trying to log on my ABAP Cloud project in eclipse. I am getting the following error : Error while logging on the service instance using this project. Please make sure that you are logging on with : my email address. Although I simultaneously get the following message im Browser:  You have been successfully logged on: You can close this page and continue in the ABAP Development Tools. 

The trial account has only one E-mail Address. 

Yesterday, it was working perfectly but I tried the wohle day to relog in eclipse , restart it , restart windows, deleted the data in cache. But nothing seems to work unfortuantly. 

Thanks in advance

Best regards 

sisi

entry.title: Vendor Invoice Screen 'Payment' tab screen field 'DTWS1' update
entry.content:
Hi ,

Based on some criteria, I need to update the 'DTWS1' field of  'Payment' tab of FB60 tcode. I am using the FM,

'DYNP_UPDATE_FIELDS' . 

The program & screen numbers of Basic data are 'SAPMF05A'  & 1100 and the program and screen numbers  of Payment screen tab, where the field 'DTWS1' exists are 'SAPLFDCB' & '20'. But when I am passing these values its giving incorrect error ' Incorrect screen number'.

 

    the above are basic screen program name and screen numbers. Similarly am giving for 'Payment' tab screen as 'SAPLFDCB' & '20'. But its giving error. Pl suggest.

Rgds,

G.Khadeer Basha

entry.title: How to navigate from ALV report output to Outlook up on clicking on an email address cell
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are having an email address field in the ALV Grid output. The requirement is when we click on email address it should trigger Outlook and email address should be copied to 'To' section. We are able to enable Hotspot on the field but not able to proceed further with the requirement.

We are using REUSE_ALV_GRID to display the output.

Thanks in Advance.

Regards,

Anand

entry.title: Finding a Service in SPROXY transaction created in SAP PI
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to find a Service Interface in SPROXY transaction but i find no other option but to keep scrolling down the endless objects to find my Service Interface.

When I use Namespace->Object Types->Object , I only find the Service Interfaces I already activated but not the ones I want to activate.

Is there a way I can find the Service Interface using another t-code or another way so I can generate the Inbound (Provider) Interface without going through this laborious process.

Many thanks in Advance,

Paul.

entry.title: Mass Update a Zfield in Std Table with Split & Job submit
entry.content:
Hi,
I need to do a mass update for a single Z*custom field of  a STD table(say EANL).
The no. of records expected are around 3 million recs.

I am using Open cursor & then Fetch cursor technique to get 50000 records(package) at a time and update it in a do..enddo loop. Ofcourse 'Package' is a selection screen field.

Is this a right approach?

Now how do i make this fetch cursor & update(using FM) to submit into different background jobs?

I know there are std FM's like FM's JOB_OPEN, SUBMIT Program & Job_ClOSE. But how do i fit these pieces together(fetch cursor + Update+ jobs) to make use these FM's into my program?

Can anyone  please suggest.

Thanks

entry.title: Change value of an attribute Inforecord Classification
entry.content:
Hello,

i want to change a value of an attribute for an inforrecord with classification (OKCODEPLANT & Type 057).

So I want to use the BAPI:

BAPI_OBJCL_CHANGE

My Import parameter was following: 

But this settings does not work.

In the table ausp I see the object key combination (lifnr & matnr). But it also does not work when i use this key instead of the inforecord number. 

Here you can see the maintenance view of my info record classification.

Can anyone help.

entry.title: What is the preferred way of data fetch from HANA view in ABAP Program
entry.content:
Hello All,

I see the following options to fetch data from HANA view in ABAP program, would like to know, what is the preferred way:

1. Create an AMDP, and fetch data from HANA view inside AMDP, and use it in program,

2. Create an external view, and fetch data from the view,

3. Use native SQL.

Thanks & Regards,

Naga

entry.title: Re: How to Create Application Job in SAP ABAP Cloud ?
entry.content:
Hello, 

please use appropriate SAP Managed Tags - such as "ABAP Development and "ABAP RESTful application programming model" - when creating questions or blog posts. 

You may have a look at this blog post by Andre Fischer:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-schedule-application-jobs-from-a-rap-based-business-object/ba-p/13553507 

Kind regards,
Carine

entry.title: Unschedule a CRM Action
entry.content:
I have an action with a schedule condition and a start condition.

I want to schedule it when my object has a specific status.

Then I want to start it on a specific date.

If the status changes before that specific date, I want to delete that scheduled action and not trigger it when the date comes.

How can I do that?

entry.title: What table is utilized to save Subscription Contract status?
entry.content: Some subscription contracts are in "Technically Inactive" status. Using the "Manage Subnscription Contracts" in SAP BRIM Fiori and looking for a specific contract I can see the field "Technically Active" with No as value. They made me to look why those subscription contracts are in such status but no luck. Any clue where I can set a breakpoint and investigate further? Actually if I knew the name of the table for Subscription contracts or their statuses could be of great help. Thank you

entry.title: Screen selection field of a Query program went missing upon modification of Infoset.
entry.content: I have an InfoSet named ZINFO1. I have added a custom field on the "additional fields" portion of the InfoSet. However, upon generating the infoset and regenerating the query, a selection field in the selection screen went missing. How do I address it? Assuming that the field is a standard field.

entry.title: System functions in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
Hi,

what are the system functions such as 'HELP_PUT_FIELD' & 'DYNP_STATUS_GET' do in SAP ABAP? how to check the authorization for this ? as I am getting the error while executing the below statement.

1. call 'HELP_PUT_FIELD' id "DYNAME' field 'DYNAME

                                      id 'DYNPRO' field 'DYNPRO' ,

 

2. Call 'DYNP_GET_STATUS' id FUNCTION field 16

                                           id VALUE field hf.

    

Rgds,

Khadeer Basha

entry.title: How to unlock a user with BAPI from JAVA using JCO in a CUA target system
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm writing a code in JAVA using JCo to connect to the CUA system and to a user unlock using the bapi BAPI_USER_UNLOCK.
Until now I'm able to unlock the user account in CUA itself, so how can I specify to unlock the user in a specific CUA system member.?

Is it not possible to specify the execution somehow using a RFC?

Thanks a lot for your help.
